products.name: Long Mala Set – Gold
products.description: Elegant handcrafted long mala set with shimmering kundan-inspired crystals, intricate floral detailing and premium gold-tone finish. Includes long mala necklace, matching tikka and traditional jhumki earrings. Perfect for weddings, Eid, mehndi, sangeet, receptions and special occasions.

products.name: The Shaahi Collection – Semi Bridal Choker Set
products.image: products/Semi bridal sets/Semi bridal sets/The Shaahi collection/990B7F85-1F3A-4A67-B549-F78411430591.png
products.description: Turn heads with the timeless elegance of our Shaahi Waterfall Semi Bridal Choker Set, a luxurious South Asian jewellery set designed to make every occasion unforgettable. Featuring intricate antique gold craftsmanship, shimmering champagne crystals and rich bead detailing. The beautifully layered waterfall choker creates a graceful cascading effect, while the matching tikka and earrings complete the look with effortless sophistication.

products.name: Sereya Collection – Teal
products.image: products/Semi bridal sets/Semi bridal sets/The Sereya Collection/E959068F-5128-4057-9188-AF5AD66D1660.png
products.description: Make an unforgettable entrance with our signature Sereya Semi Bridal Choker Set. Handcrafted with shimmering kundan-inspired champagne crystals, an antique gold finish and a graceful waterfall silhouette. Featuring a beautifully layered choker adorned with sparkling crystal drops and elegant coloured bead detailing. Complete with matching statement jhumki earrings and a coordinating tikka.

products.name: Stone Choker Set – Gold
products.description: Exquisitely handcrafted floral kundan-inspired choker set featuring dazzling high-grade faceted crystals, delicate micro pearl detailing, and elegant teardrop crystal drops. Includes statement choker necklace, jhumki earrings and matching maang tikka. Perfect for weddings, bridal wear, receptions, engagements, Mehndi, Sangeet, Eid and Diwali.
